option.name: VM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --add-exports java.desktop/com.apple.eawt.event=ALL-UNNAMED --add-exports java.desktop/com.apple.eio=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.text=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.desktop/java.awt=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.desktop/java.awt.font=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.desktop/java.awt.geom=ALL-UNNAMED
